siteMetadata.description: a few of my favorite things

nodes.excerpt: Favorite articles I've read in first two quarters of 2018. What about "The Breakfast Club" This Woman Saved the Americas From the Nazis Christ in the Garden of Endless Breadsticks The White Darkness - A solitary journey across Antarctica. The Strange Brain of the World’s Greatest Solo Climber - Alex…

Winter has been quite mild in NYC although its currently blizzarding outside. I've mostly been listening to the Westone UM 30 IEMs with the Pioneer XDP-100R DAP with Shure olive tips to block out the subway and constructions sounds as I move about the city. I've been enjoying this setup for quite…

ITS FINALLY THE END OF THE YEAR CAN YOU EVEN BELIEVE I'm still on an Internet Archive Live Music kick. Ryan Adams Live at Das Haus on 2006-10-17 - amazing with headphones, especially Magnolia Mountain. Snow In Mexico has been my constant coding companion as of late. And, last but not least by far…
